+## CRITICAL SITUATION (Day 112, Week 16)

-## THIS WEEK'S CHANGES (Week 15 → 16)
+## ROOT CAUSE: Quality Gap from Competitor Events
+- Major competitor quality bumps starting Day 69-75:
+  - ApexSaaS/CloudPeak: ~0.09 quality bump
+  - RivalTech: ~0.10 quality bump
+  - QuantumEdge: ~0.103 quality bump
+- These PERMANENTLY raised quality expectations for all customer groups
+- Our last new subscriber was Day 72 — exactly when these events hit
+- S1 Plan A quality (T1): 0.2141 — likely BELOW new quality floor
+- S1 Plan B quality (T2): 0.2676 — also possibly below
+- Even with lead promo making first month FREE, leads don't convert
+- This proves it's a QUALITY problem, not a price problem
+
+## Quality Delivered (Day 112)
+- base=0.20, global_bonus=0.1306 (from R&D T1+T2)
+- **S1**: Plan A=0.2141, Plan B=0.2676, Plan C=0.2676 (group bonus=0.0262)
+- **S3**: Plan A=0.1993, Plan B=0.2491, Plan C=0.2491
+- Formula: (base+global_bonus+group_bonus) × tier_multiplier
+

-- No ongoing subscription promotions

+## Financial Trajectory
+- Burn rate: ~$154/week (long-run average)
+- Runway: ~8.5 weeks ($1,307 / $154)
+- NOT break-even at current sub count
+- Need ~350 subs to break even at current pricing
+- Cannot acquire new subs (quality too low)
 
-## Converting Leads is TOP PRIORITY
-- 19 leads/week from network (organic)
-- 0% conversion for 3+ weeks running
-- S1 quality delivered: Plan A (T1) = 0.2148, Plan B (T2) = 0.2686
-- S1 quality floor estimate: 0.088 (but ±40% noise → actual could be 0.062-0.123)
-- Our quality is 2.4x above the estimated minimum
-- WHY aren't leads converting? Possible reasons:
-  1. **Reputation too low** — leads arrive but company reputation makes them hesitant
-  2. **Competitor events raised expectations** — actual q_min may be higher than estimate
-  3. **Price sensitivity** — even at $7, Plan A may be too expensive
-  4. **Lead promotion needed** — discount to try service
-- ACTION: Lead promotion set at $10 total for S1 ($5 global + $5 by group)
+## Cannot Afford Quality Improvement
+- R&D T1 (repeatable): $166,667 → need 128x current cash
+- Model tier upgrade costs: Plan A T1→T2 adds ~$10/day compute = $70/week
+- Targeted dev spend: even $50/day takes 30+ days for meaningful impact
+- ALL options unaffordable at current cash level
 
-## Quality vs Group Requirements  
-- **S1**: q_min=0.088, delivered A=0.2148 (2.4x buffer), B=0.2686 (3x buffer)
-- **S3**: q_min=0.185, delivered A=0.2001 (barely at T1), B=0.2501
-- **S2**: q_min=0.343, delivered A=0.1991 — CANNOT serve
-- **All Enterprise**: q_min > 0.6 — CANNOT serve
+## What We've Tried That Didn't Work
+- Lead promotion up to $15/mo (effectively free first month) → 0 conversion
+- Social posts about metrics/issue resolution → received negatively
+- Price cuts (Plan A to $7 from $8, Plan B to $17 from $19) → still 0 conversion
+- Increased ops spend ($40-50/day) → didn't improve lead conversion
 
-## R&D Status
-- T1 completed: +0.0289
-- T2 completed: +0.0619
-- Total permanent quality bonus: +0.0908 (in global_bonus=0.1319)
-- All further tiers cost $167K+ — impossible on current cash
+## Key Learnings
+- **ALL social posts received negatively** (notifications confirm -0.3 to -0.7 reactions)
+  - Don't post about metrics, issue resolution, or quality claims
+  - Enterprise groups (E1-E3) especially negative toward our posts
+- **Competitor events are the core problem** — permanently raised quality floors
+- **Quality floor estimates are unreliable** (info level 2 = ±40% noise)
+- **60% of churn is reputation-driven** (from earlier analysis)
+- **Billing is lumpy** — only 7/30 of subs bill each week
+- **log_rationale is part of next-week CLI** (not a separate API call)
+- **Ad revenue must be watched** — can reset, always verify ads_strength
 
-## Ad Revenue Mechanic
-- At ads_strength=1.0, ad_revenue ≈ $0.083/sub/day
-- With 221 subs: ~$18.43/day
-- **AD REVENUE WAS $0 IN WEEK 13** — restored by resetting ads_strength to 1.0
-- Must verify ads_strength EACH WEEK (may reset?)
+## Strategy Going Forward
+- **SURVIVAL MODE**: minimize burn, preserve cash as long as possible
+- Cannot invest in quality, cannot afford R&D
+- Hope for: economic recovery (PMI > 50), competitor slowdown, or unexpected positive events
+- Each week: verify ads_strength, check lead conversion, monitor churn
+- If any way to afford targeted dev spend on S1, do it (even $5/day accumulates)
+- Social media: try product-focused posts only, not metrics
 
-## Social Media
-- Posted Week 15: "Issues down 68% — from 209 to 66. Resolved 1,400+ tickets" (post_id: 11)
-- Previous posts: post_id 8, 9, 10 about issue resolution

-## Economy  
+## Economy
 - PMI = 46.1 (contraction) — enterprise tightening budgets
 - Companies cutting SaaS spend, delaying evaluations
-- This hurts all customer segments
-
-## Critical monitoring each week
-1. **AD REVENUE**: Must verify it's appearing ($18+/day)
-2. **LEAD CONVERSION**: Did lead promo work? Any new subs?
-3. **CHURN RATE**: Should continue declining (14 last week → hopefully <10)
-4. **CASH**: Must stay positive (goal >$500)
-5. **ISSUES**: Check subscriber issues count (was 66)
-6. **OUTAGES**: More likely at ops=$10/day
 
-## Learnings
-- **log_rationale is NOT a separate Python API** — it's part of `next-week` CLI command  
-- **Next-week format**: `./novamind-operation next-week "rationale" c1_pt c1_lo c1_hi c4_pt c4_lo c4_hi c12_pt c12_lo c12_hi c26_pt c26_lo c26_hi`
-- **Ad revenue resets!** Always verify and re-set ads_strength each week
-- **60% of churn is reputation-driven** — even resolving all issues won't stop 60% of churn
-- **Billing is lumpy** — sub revenue varies weekly (only 7/30 of subs bill each week)
-- **Dashboard "Open Issues" counts only subscriber issues** — total open issues is much higher
-- **Lead promotion is additive** — global + group + channel + channel×group
-- **ALL current subs are S1** — single segment dependency
-- **Lead acquisition cost**: $0.50 per lead (regardless of conversion)
